hypothesis: Pre-trained universal machine-learning interatomic potentials, particularly equivariant GNNs and graph-transformer architectures with appropriate dispersion corrections, can reproduce CP2K/PBE-D3(BJ) DFT-level structural, thermodynamic, and mechanical properties of diverse metal–organic frameworks—producing optimized geometries, stable NpT trajectories, bulk moduli, and heat capacities that closely match the DFT references without task-specific fine-tuning.
